summary:
package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration.behavior; import java.util.stream.Collectors; public class StepModeInstructionModule implements InstructionModule { @Override public String getInstructions(ExecutionPolicy policy) { if (policy.getInteractionMode() != ExecutionPolicy.InteractionMode.STEP) { return ""; } StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(); sb.append("INTERACTION: STEP MODE (Supervision: ").append(policy.getSupervisionLevel()).append(")
") .append("→ Execution is paused after each step for human review.
") .append("→ Provide clear, granular actions that can be easily verified.
") .append("→ Assume each action will be explicitly approved or rejected."); if (!policy.getConstraints().isEmpty()) { sb.append("
CONSTRAINTS:
") .append(policy.getConstraints().stream().map(c -> "→ " + c).collect(Collectors.joining("
"))); } return sb.toString(); } }
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
